1hero_description: IVS是一个全面的教育生态系统，提供从语言培训、技能培训到为教育组织提供战略咨询的创新解决方案。
1process_step1_desc: IVS JSC详细倾听合作伙伴关于数量、国籍、经验、专业知识、预算和其他特殊要求的需求。我们将建议最合适的服务套餐。
1process_step2_desc: 根据要求，我们从全球网络中搜索候选人。资料会经过资格、证书（TESOL/CELTA）、经验和犯罪记录的全面筛选。
1process_step3_desc: 潜在候选人将接受IVS专家团队的深入面试。之后，我们会组织示范教学环节，评估实际教学能力和软技能。
1process_step4_desc: IVS JSC发送最合适候选人的简历和评估结果，供合作伙伴选择并直接面试（如有需要）。一旦合作伙伴选择了教师，我们将协助签署劳动合同手续。
1process_step4_title: 候选人介绍与合同签署
1process_step5_desc: IVS的法律团队将在准备文件、提交和跟踪在越南申请工作许可证、签证和临时居留证的整个过程中提供咨询和支持，确保符合规定。
1process_step5_title: 法律程序支持（工作许可证、签证、临时居留证）
1process_step6_desc: 提供文化定向课程，支持外籍教师融入，并解决任何出现的问题（如服务合同中有规定）。
about_achievements_subtitle: IVS JSC发展历程中值得自豪的里程碑。
about_activity_biz_desc: 为企业提供全面解决方案：从行政程序、税务、网站、学习材料设计到专业运营支持服务。
about_activity_biz_title: 管理咨询和商业解决方案
about_activity_edu_desc: 提供创新而全面的教育解决方案，包括师资、课程、设施和学生服务支持，使教育机构能够提高质量和达到国际标准。
about_activity_intl_desc: 各级留学...与越南及全球的大学、学院和教育机构建立联系，以促进学生和教师的交流项目、联合研究和文化交流。
about_ceo_achievements: 成就：龙城县青年团颁发的奖状，表彰其对当地青年运动的贡献。
about_ceo_certs: 证书：TOEIC 620，全球迷你MBA，教育管理专业资格。
about_ceo_education1: 越南航空学院英语语言与工商管理学士。
about_ceo_experience: 重要经历：AMG国际教育股份公司发展部主管；曾在VietJet Air、The Grand Ho Tram Strip工作。
about_cta_final_desc: 无论您是教育机构、企业，还是寻求创新学习解决方案的个人，IVS都准备好与您同行。联系我们，共同塑造教育的未来。
about_cta_subtitle: IVS的每一个字、每一行都致力于实现全球教育的梦想。
about_cta_title: IVS – 实现全球教育梦想
about_dev_plan_intro: IVS JSC设定了一个长远目标，即建立一个名为IVS全球学校的全面K-12教育体系，从幼儿园到高中。
about_dev_plan_title: 发展计划：IVS全球学校生态系统
about_hero_subtitle: 建立一个全球教育生态系统。
about_intro: IVS JSC是一家开创性的教育提供商，专注于将创新技术、高质量内容和专业发展整合到我们的教育解决方案中。我们致力于满足现代学习者和教育机构的动态需求，以卓越、诚信和前瞻性为指导。
about_intro_desc: Integrate Vision Synergy股份公司（IVS JSC）是一家在教育领域运营的公司，专注于提供从学前教育到高等教育的全面解决方案，并提供专业发展课程。我们致力于通过创新的方法、先进的技术和对教育质量的坚定承诺，为越南的学习者创造可持续的价值。
about_intro_video_caption: 我们的公司介绍视频将带您了解IVS JSC的使命、愿景和核心价值观。
about_introsong_ivs: 此外，这也是我们公司的主题曲，由阮明哲先生亲自创作和演唱，讲述了IVS的转型历程。
about_ivs_academy_desc_long: IVS学院是IVS JSC教育生态系统的核心。我们提供从外语培训、软技能发展到国际证书备考和应需定制课程的各种高质量课程。
about_ivs_academy_title: 关于IVS学院：知识与技能的交汇处
about_ivs_p1: Integrate Vision Synergy股份公司（IVS JSC）是一家致力于在教育领域提供全面和创新解决方案的先驱。我们的名字——整合（Integrate）、愿景（Vision）、协同（Synergy）——不仅是一个品牌，更是我们运营和发展的指导哲学。
about_ivs_p2: 我们相信，技术、卓越的教育内容和专业发展之间的结合，是为学习者和教育机构创造突破性解决方案的关键。
about_ivs_title: 关于IVS JSC：质量、信誉、奉献
about_journey_phase1_desc: 完成核心服务生态系统，包括IVS学院、IVS教育、IVS咨询和IVS Celestech，为强劲发展奠定坚实基础。
about_journey_phase2_desc: 建设IVS初中和高中，同时将先进的教育技术应用于整个系统，并拓展国际合作。
about_journey_phase3_desc: IVS全球学校成为一个完整的K-12教育体系，在越南的教育质量和创新方面处于领先地位，并逐步走向国际。
about_meta_description: 了解IVS JSC - Integrate Vision Synergy。我们的愿景、使命、核心价值观和全面的教育生态系统，旨在塑造越南教育的未来。
about_meta_keywords: IVS JSC、关于我们、愿景、使命、核心价值观、教育生态系统、领导团队
about_og_description: 深入了解IVS JSC：其基础哲学、发展历程以及我们为教育界带来的突破性解决方案。与我们一起创造教育的未来。
about_og_title: 关于IVS JSC - 愿景与使命
about_page_subtitle: 整合愿景协同贸易服务股份公司
about_partners_subtitle: IVS很自豪能与越南及全球领先的教育机构、技术公司和组织合作。
about_philosophy_integrate_desc: 我们相信连接的力量——将技术、内容和人联系起来，创造一个全面而高效的教育生态系统。
about_philosophy_ivs: “整合-愿景-协同”不仅是公司名称中的三个词，更是我们所有活动的核心支柱，指引我们走向可持续发展的未来。
about_philosophy_subtitle: “整合-愿景-协同”不仅是公司名称中的三个词，更是我们所有活动的核心支柱，指引我们走向可持续发展的未来。
about_philosophy_synergy_desc: 真正的力量来自于合作。我们将合作伙伴、专家和社区的优势结合起来，共同创造卓越的价值。
about_philosophy_vision_desc: IVS不仅着眼于现在，更展望未来，识别教育趋势，为我们的客户和合作伙伴抓住新的机遇。
about_structure_subtitle: IVS JSC以灵活和专业的组织架构运营，确保所有部门之间的协同和高效。
about_team_intro: 在IVS JSC，我们为拥有一支由充满激情、经验丰富和致力于教育事业的专家组成的团队而自豪。
about_team_subtitle: 与教育创新领域的领导者见面，他们每天推动IVS的愿景。
about_vision_desc: 成为越南领先的教育和技术解决方案提供商，为越南年轻一代走向全球做出贡献。
academy_desc: 该部门通过外语培训、技能发展和国际证书备考，构建核心能力。
academy_item1: 外语培训： 英语（雅思、托业、交际英语）、汉语等课程。
academy_item2: 技能发展： 批判性思维、领导力、公开演讲等课程。
academy_item3: 英语水平测试： 标准化、准确的评估测试。
academy_service1: 英语语言培训（雅思、托业、剑桥）
academy_service2: 软技能发展（批判性思维、领导力）
achievement1_desc: 表彰阮明哲先生对当地青年运动的贡献。
achievement2_desc: IVS JSC因其在教育领域应用创新解决方案而获奖。
achievement3_desc: 被领先的教育组织认定为重要的战略合作伙伴。
activity_edtech_desc: IVS Celestech - 开发先进的学习平台、教育管理软件和交互式学习工具。
activity_education_desc: 为从幼儿园到高中的各个层次开发和实施有效的联合培训项目。
activity_international_coop_desc: 连接各级留学项目，并与国际组织合作开展教育项目。
affiliated_units_intro: 每个单位都是一个至关重要的组成部分，共同构成IVS JSC的协同力量。

ai_power_amplified_desc: 人工智能的力量通过生态系统和平台被放大，这些平台整合了各种工具、数据源和用户群。
ai_power_era_description: 在生成式人工智能时代，“最强”是一个流动的概念，取决于具体任务、成本和所需生态系统的整合。
ai_strongest_world: 世界上最强的人工智能
ai_tool_desc_alexa: 亚马逊的虚拟助手，能够进行语音交互、播放音乐、设置闹钟等。
ai_tool_desc_chatgpt: OpenAI开发的一款先进的语言模型，能够进行类似人类的对话并执行各种语言任务。
ai_tool_desc_claude: Anthropic的一款AI助手，专注于乐于助人、无害和诚实的互动。
ai_tool_desc_copilot: 微软的AI助手，集成于各种产品中，提供编码辅助、内容创作等功能。
ai_tool_desc_dalle: 一款来自OpenAI的AI模型，可以根据文本描述创作图像。
ai_tool_desc_deepseek: 一个专注于代码生成的AI平台，为开发人员提供强大的工具。
ai_tool_desc_gcp_vision: 谷歌云平台的一项服务，提供强大的图像分析能力。
ai_tool_desc_gemini: 谷歌的一系列多模态AI模型，能够理解和处理文本、图像和音频。
ai_tool_desc_google_assistant: 谷歌的AI虚拟助手，可在各种设备上使用。
ai_tool_desc_grok: xAI的一款对话式AI，旨在以幽默的方式回答问题。
ai_tool_desc_midjourney: 一个独立的AI图像生成器，以其艺术和高质量的输出而闻名。
ai_tool_desc_perplexity: 一款结合了大型语言模型和搜索引擎的AI聊天机器人。
ai_tool_desc_powerbi: 微软的一款商业分析工具，可实现数据可视化和报告。
ai_tool_desc_pytorch: 一个由Facebook的AI研究实验室开发的开源机器学习库。

lesson_part_1_desc: Fun movement/intellectual games, lively songs, engaging stories... stimulate interest, create a comfortable atmosphere and connect with the lesson topic.

lifeskills_w1_d1_activities: Greeting circle combined with songs, "Introduction Ball" game (throwing the ball and introducing), "Familiar Faces" activity (identifying friends through descriptions), creating creative name tags.
lifeskills_w1_d1_goal: Session goal: Children can introduce their name, age, simple hobbies; perform appropriate greeting actions (folding hands, nodding, shaking hands...); feel comfortable and natural when speaking in front of a small group.
lifeskills_w1_d1_kns3: Basic listening skills (paying attention when someone speaks).
lifeskills_w1_d2_activities: Role-playing situations (receiving gifts, spilling things, wanting to borrow things...), "Guess the Emotion by Voice/Facial Expression" game, making a "Beautiful Words Tree", discussing the importance of polite words.
lifeskills_w1_d2_goal: Session goal: Children understand and practice using "magic words" (Thank you, Sorry, Excuse me, Please...) in appropriate situations; recognize basic expressions through tone of voice and facial expressions.
lifeskills_w1_d2_kns2: Recognizing and naming basic emotions (happy, sad, angry).
lifeskills_w1_d2_kns3: Using language appropriate to the communication context.
lifeskills_w1_d3_activities: "Telephone" game, "Listen and Draw" game, listening to stories and asking questions, "Interview a Tablemate" activity, practicing simple pair Q&A.
lifeskills_w1_d3_goal: Session goal: Children practice effective listening steps (looking at the speaker, nodding, not interrupting); know how to ask simple questions (Who? What? Where? When?) to clarify information and show interest.
lifeskills_w1_d3_title: Session 3: Listening Ears & Asking Good Questions (Active Listening & Basic Q&A)
lifeskills_week1_goal: Weekly goal: Help children confidently introduce themselves clearly, practice polite greeting rituals, get acquainted with basic listening skills and recognize the importance of respectful and effective communication.
lifeskills_week1_title: Week 1 Content (Example): Hello & Basic Communication Skills

steam_program_grade6_details: Familiarizing with STEAM concepts and interdisciplinary thinking.

Practicing basic presentation and teamwork skills.

Building foundational programming structures, variables, loops, conditions.
Applying programming to solve Science and Math problems.
Executing small integrated Science projects (e.g., simulating natural phenomena).
Developing advanced searching, information analysis, and complex problem-solving skills.
steam_program_grade8_details: Main tool: Robotics kits (e.g., Arduino, Micro:bit or equivalent).
Learning basic principles of electronics, mechanics, sensors.
Programming robots to perform specific tasks.
Developing engineering thinking, design, and fabrication skills.
Fostering collaboration and project management skills through robotics challenges.

Introduction to Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning, and applications.
Learning basic data collection and analysis.
Executing large-scale integrated STEAM projects, combining learned knowledge (programming, robotics, AI, design...).
Career orientation related to STEAM, discussing technology ethics.

steam_vision_main_subtitle: Explore the 'STEAM is Mindset' vision, 'STEAM+ Intelligence' philosophy, and IVS's commitment to developing 21st-century competencies through integrated, innovative, and 'STEAM+ Intelligence'-oriented STEAM education.
steam_vision_main_title: IVS STEAM: Shaping a Creative Future
steam_vision_quote: "IVS believes in the power of STEAM education to unlock potential and shape the future."
steam_vision_section1_p1: At IVS, we believe that STEAM is not just an acronym for Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics. It is an interdisciplinary mindset, a creative approach to solving real-world problems. The 'STEAM is Mindset' philosophy emphasizes equipping students with the ability to connect fragmented knowledge into a comprehensive picture, view challenges from multiple perspectives, and find effective, sustainable solutions.
steam_vision_section1_p2: We see STEAM as a bridge between academic theory and practical application, between school learning and diverse real-world experiences. By integrating these fields, we nurture innate curiosity, encourage students to ask 'why' and 'how,' develop critical thinking, complex problem-solving skills, effective teamwork, and communication. This is the core foundation, aligned with the Quality – Dedication – Innovation – Equality values that IVS pursues, helping students confidently build their future.
steam_vision_section2_intro: With a long-term vision and dedication in education, IVS sets clear strategic goals for the STEAM program, aiming to equip Vietnamese students, especially in the Long Thanh - Dong Nai area, with a solid foundation for success in the digital age and international integration:
steam_vision_section2_list_items: Developing 4C competencies: Solidly equipping 21st-century skills: Critical Thinking, Creativity, Collaboration, and Communication.
Enhancing interdisciplinary knowledge: Helping students deeply understand the connections between Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics, applying them to solve real-world problems.
Fostering passion for technology and engineering: Igniting interest in programming, robotics, AI, and high-tech fields, orienting future careers.
Integrating Arts: Not just limited to STEM, the Arts element is integrated to enhance creativity, design thinking, and comprehensive problem-solving.

Connecting practice and community: Creating opportunities for students to participate in meaningful projects, linked to local needs and contexts (such as the IELTS Station project in Long Thanh initiated by CEO Nguyen Minh Triet).
Ensuring equal access: Striving to bring quality STEAM education to all students, regardless of background, in line with the core value of Equality.
steam_vision_section3_intro: To realize its philosophy and goals, IVS (through IVS Education) applies advanced STEAM education approaches, learner-centered, emphasizing creativity and practical experience, aligned with international standards (through IIVSA partnership and partners like The Power to Inspire):
steam_vision_section3_list_items: Project-Based Learning (PBL): Students actively explore, research, and execute real-world projects, thereby mastering knowledge and developing skills.
Integrated Learning: Subjects are naturally interwoven, helping students clearly see connections and integrated applications.

Application of technology and digital solutions: Utilizing programming platforms (Scratch, Python), robotics, AI, and digital learning solutions developed by IVS Education to enhance interaction and learning effectiveness.
Experiential Learning: Prioritizing hands-on activities, experiments, model building, and field trips (if applicable) for students to 'learn by doing'.
Collaborative and critical thinking environment: Encouraging students to work in teams, exchange ideas, present, and defend their viewpoints.
Diverse competency assessment: Using various assessment forms (process, project products, presentations, self-assessment...) instead of solely focusing on traditional test scores.
steam_vision_section4_intro: The unique and pioneering aspect of IVS's vision is the 'STEAM+ Intelligence' orientation. We believe that to truly succeed and be happy in the 21st century, students not only need to master STEAM knowledge and skills but also to develop crucial intelligences and supplementary competencies. 'Intelligence' here is understood comprehensively, including:
steam_vision_section4_list_items: Core STEAM competencies: A solid foundation in Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics.
Emotional Intelligence (EQ): The ability to recognize, understand, and manage one's own and others' emotions, building positive relationships.
Digital Intelligence (DQ): The ability to use digital technology safely, effectively, and responsibly; the ability to analyze information and communicate in online environments.
Growth Mindset: Belief in one's ability to learn and improve through effort and perseverance; readiness to face challenges and learn from failures.
Adaptability & Lifelong Learning: The ability to be flexible in the face of change, actively updating knowledge and new skills in a constantly evolving world.
steam_vision_section5_p1: IVS is strongly committed to investing in and developing STEAM education as a strategic pillar, contributing to enhancing the quality of future human resources for Vietnam. We constantly strive to deliver high-quality programs, built by a dedicated and continuously innovative team, ensuring equal learning opportunities for all students.
steam_vision_section5_p2:
This commitment is demonstrated through:
- Continuously updating programs to international standards, integrating the unique "STEAM+ Intelligence" orientation.
- Applying advanced educational technology and digital learning solutions developed by IVS Education.
- Building and nurturing a passionate teaching staff with STEAM expertise and modern pedagogical skills.
- Maintaining and expanding cooperation with reputable educational partners domestically and internationally (such as IIVSA, The Power to Inspire, Kinderlink25 project...).
steam_vision_section5_p3: We believe that every student holds unlimited potential. IVS is committed to creating an inspiring, safe, and encouraging learning environment where students are free to explore, experience, make mistakes, and grow. Together with parents and the community, IVS will accompany in building a confident, dynamic, compassionate young generation of Vietnam, ready to master the future and contribute positively to the development of Long Thanh, Dong Nai, and the country.

website_overview_subtitle: Nền tảng kỹ thuật số toàn diện, cung cấp cái nhìn sâu sắc về hệ sinh thái giáo dục, công nghệ và nguồn nhân lực của IVS JSC.
website_overview_title: Tổng quan về Hệ thống Website IVS Academy
website_services_heading: Dịch vụ Chính của IVS Academy
website_services_intro: Chúng tôi cung cấp đa dạng các dịch vụ cốt lõi nhằm đáp ứng nhu cầu giáo dục và phát triển:
website_services_item_1: Hợp tác giáo dục (Mầm non, Tiểu học, THCS & THPT, Trung tâm Ngoại ngữ).
website_services_item_2: Cung ứng giáo viên nước ngoài và giải pháp nhân sự chuyên biệt.
website_services_item_3: Tư vấn pháp lý chuyên sâu cho các tổ chức giáo dục.
website_services_item_4: Phát triển chương trình đào tạo chuẩn quốc tế (STEAM, Kỹ năng sống, Tiếng Anh).
website_services_item_5: Giải pháp công nghệ giáo dục (EdTech), nâng cao kỹ năng (Upskilling), và thiết kế website.
website_structure_intro: Website được tổ chức khoa học với các chuyên mục chính, giúp đối tác dễ dàng tìm kiếm thông tin:
website_structure_item_1: Về IVS: Tầm nhìn, sứ mệnh, giá trị cốt lõi.
website_structure_item_2: Dịch vụ: Chi tiết các dịch vụ giáo dục và tư vấn.
website_structure_item_3: Đối tác Giáo dục: Chương trình hợp tác các cấp học.
website_structure_item_4: Tư vấn Pháp lý: Hỗ trợ pháp lý chuyên sâu.
website_structure_item_5: Giải pháp: Công nghệ giáo dục, nâng cao kỹ năng, thiết kế website.
website_structure_item_6: Thư viện & Bộ sưu tập: Tài nguyên giáo dục, kho truyện, trò chơi, ứng dụng.
website_structure_item_7: Tin tức: Cập nhật thông tin và sự kiện mới nhất.
website_structure_item_8: Liên hệ: Thông tin liên lạc và hỗ trợ.
website_support_heading: Giải pháp Hỗ trợ Đối tác Toàn diện
website_support_intro: IVS cam kết đồng hành cùng đối tác với các gói giải pháp chuyên biệt và hệ sinh thái số:
website_support_item_1: Hỗ trợ A-Z thành lập và vận hành trung tâm giáo dục.
website_support_item_2: Phát triển website và nền tảng số tối ưu hóa sự hiện diện trực tuyến.
website_support_item_3: Hệ sinh thái Số IVS (IVS Apps, IVS Games, IVS Reading, IVS Gallery) tối ưu hóa học tập và quản lý.
website_support_item_4: Gói Giải pháp Chuyên biệt cho trường học (K-12), trung tâm ngôn ngữ & kỹ năng, doanh nghiệp, bao gồm:
website_support_subitem_1: Chương trình giảng dạy tích hợp.
website_support_subitem_2: Cung ứng giáo viên, tổ chức cuộc thi học thuật.
website_support_subitem_3: Phát triển hệ thống LMS, tư vấn thành lập & vận hành.
website_support_subitem_4: Chương trình học độc quyền, giải pháp CRM & Ứng dụng di động.
website_support_subitem_5: Hỗ trợ tuyển sinh, đào tạo tiếng Anh thương mại, nâng cao kỹ năng, tư vấn chiến lược nhân sự.
why_ivs_1_desc: Dedicated, experienced teachers with high pedagogical and professional qualifications (Vietnam & Foreign).
why_ivs_2_desc: Using updated textbooks from reputable publishers (Cambridge, Macmillan, Berlitz...), closely following the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR) and HSK standards.
why_ivs_3_desc: Applying interactive, communication-focused methods (Communicative Approach), combining technology and diverse practical activities.
why_ivs_4_desc: Thorough entrance test, advice on a learning path suitable for each student's level and goals.
why_ivs_5_desc: Comfortable learning space, reasonable class sizes, creating motivation and confidence for learners.
why_ivs_6_desc: Center located in Long Thanh, Dong Nai, easy to travel for students in the area.
why_ivs_gvnn_1_desc_enhanced: Strict multi-round recruitment process, focusing on assessing practical teaching abilities through in-depth interviews, demo lessons, soft skills checks, in addition to degrees (Bachelor+), international certificates (TESOL/CELTA...), and experience.
why_ivs_gvnn_2_desc_enhanced: A vast international partner network allows recruitment from various countries (UK, US, Australia, Canada, Philippines, South Africa...), always prioritizing quality and suitability over quantity.
why_ivs_gvnn_3_desc: A team of legal experts handles Work Permit, visa, and temporary residence card applications quickly and efficiently, ensuring 100% compliance with regulations.
why_ivs_gvnn_4_desc: Organize Vietnamese cultural orientation sessions, training on suitable teaching methods, supporting foreign teachers to integrate and maximize their capabilities in the new work environment.
why_ivs_subtitle: We are committed to delivering practical value through our inseparable operating principles.
why_partner_ecosystem_desc: IVS Academy (đào tạo ngôn ngữ & kỹ năng) và IVS Education (phát triển chương trình STEAM và giải pháp học tập số) mở rộng cơ hội hợp tác.
why_partner_expertise_desc: Đội ngũ chuyên gia của IVS có kinh nghiệm thực tế, am hiểu sâu sắc thị trường giáo dục Việt Nam và xu hướng quốc tế.
why_partner_global_links_desc: Là thành viên chính của IIVSA – Liên minh giáo dục toàn cầu, IVS khẳng định vị thế và uy tín trên trường quốc tế.
why_partner_internationalcoop_ecosystem_: IVS Academy (language & skills training) and IVS Education (STEAM program development and digital learning solutions) expand collaboration opportunities.
why_partner_internationalcoop_expertise_: IVS's team of experts has practical experience and a deep understanding of the Vietnamese education market and international trends.
why_partner_internationalcoop_global_lin: As a key member of IIVSA – the Global Education Alliance, IVS affirms its position and reputation on the international stage.
why_partner_internationalcoop_values_des: Quality – Dedication – Innovation – Equality. IVS is committed to delivering practical and valuable programs and solutions.
why_partner_internationalcoop_vision_des: IVS possesses a long-term strategic mindset, continuously innovates, and always proposes concrete, feasible, and leading solutions.
why_partner_title: Tại sao nên hợp tác với IVS?
why_partner_values_desc: Chất lượng – Tận tâm – Sáng tạo – Bình đẳng. IVS cam kết mang lại những chương trình và giải pháp có giá trị thực tiễn.
why_partner_vision_desc: IVS sở hữu tư duy định hướng dài hạn, không ngừng đổi mới và luôn đề xuất giải pháp cụ thể, khả thi, mang tính dẫn dắt.
why_us_env_desc: Fostering innovative thinking, equality, and respect for differences.
why_us_quality_desc: Experienced expert team, international standard programs.
why_us_tech_desc_updated: From education, EdTech to consulting and business operational support.
